title: Herbert Jepson oral history transcript
creator: Jepson, Herbert, 1908- interviewee
Rogers, Marjorie, interviewer
University of California, Los Angeles. Oral History Program
description: Transcript of an 11.5-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program
Jepson discusses his rural upbringing, his interest in drawing, teaching at Otis, Chouinard, and UC Irvine, and his founding of the Jepson Art Institute
The Bancroft Library, University of California, Berkeley

The UCLA Oral History Program : catalog of the collection / compiled by Constance S. Bullock (Los Angeles : Oral History Program, University of California, Los Angeles, 1982) is available in the UCLA Dept. of Special Collections
